name: Persian Chicken Pilaf
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Boneless, skinless chicken - breast cut into half-inch pieces
6 and 1/4 cup Package Chicken Rice Pilaf Mix
recipeInstructions:
Obviously the recipe recommends using Near East Pilaf mix, but any packaged mix will do.
1. Toss chicken with paprika, cinnamon and cardamom.
2. In a large nonstick skillet, heat 2 tablespoons olive oil over medium heat. Add the chicken, cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Remove from skillet, set aside.
3. In the same skillet, heat remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat. Add onion; cook for 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in rice pilaf mix, contents of Spice Sack, broth, apricots, and orange zest; bring to a boil.
5. Cover; reduce heat to low. Simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Stir in reserved chicken and almonds. Cover; continue to simmer for 5 to 10 minutes or until liquid is absorbed.
